titleStmt.title: SII 18.301: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 301. (B.K. No. 135 of 1932-33.) KANAVAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into a wall inside the temple of Durgā.

summary.p: This inscription refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Vikramāditya as ruling over Banavāse-nāḍu and is dated in the year 1155 of Chālukya-chakravarti Sōyidēva, Vijaya, Chaitra śu. As11hṭami, Monday. The year cited is apparently of the Śaka era. But for the week-day, the details correspond to A.D. 1233, March 20, the week-day, however, being Sunday and not Monday as recorded.

The Chālukya-Chakravarti Sōyidēva mentioned in the record may be the Western Chālukya king Sōmēśvara IV. But the date given, viz., Śaka 1155 would be too late for him, for his last date known so far is A.D. 1200. The period in which this record was made, was one of confusion, the Chālukya kingdom having been divided between the Yādavas and the Hoysaḷas who were fighting with each other for supremacy. Apparently though no longer king, Sōmēśvara IV was still being nominally acknowledged as ruler in some parts of the country.
It records a grant of land made by Vikramāditya and Chenna-gāvuṇḍa of Kannavaḷḷi, for the worship and offerings to god Kallināthadēva of Mūlasthāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbavē ©
dēvadēvaṁ namastubhyaṁ sarvvajñassarvvatōmukhaḥ śrīkallināthabhūtēśaḥ traiḷōkyavara dāyakaḥ ©This and the
śivāya śāṁtarūpāyanaṁtarūpāya dhīmahē sarvvagīrvvāṇanāthāya kallinātha namōstutē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanajanavinamitānūnamaṇimakuṭamaṁḍanōpaśōbhākaragūḍhā rūḍhapādakamaḷanuṁ bhaktajanahridaya
kamaḷamārttaṁḍanuṁ . sakaḷavēdavēdāṁgamaṁtrārththajapatapōpaniṣadvākyātarkyabhāva nuṁ . dēvādhidēvanmappa śrīkallināthadēvanu sa
kaḷa bhuvanamaṁ sakāruṇyadiṁ rakṣisuttamirddu . śrīkalidēvanī bhuvanavastuviśēṣamanī viśālaratnākaramaṁ samaṁ
nteseva kuṁtaḷa dēśamaniṁte nōḷpeneṁdā kanakādriyaṁ mudadinēṟidaneṁdaḍadēke baṇnipai nākanivāsamaṁ sakaḷapuṇya
phaḷāmritamippadēśamaṁ . Āntādēvaṁ dēvalōkadiṁ bhaktajanasulabhanappudaṟiṁ bhūlōka kkavatarsiyanēkātiśayamaṁ nōḍuvalli bhūkā
nteyuṭṭa paṭṭāvaḷiyante matsyakūrmmagajanarāvaḷiyiṁ śōbhākaramāgi gaṁbhīra nīrākaramirddudadeṁtene . vasudhākānteya lōcanadvaya
davolmatsyāṁkitaṁ tannadoṁdesakaṁbetta padmāṁbujaduṁnnatiyavōlkūrmmāṁkitaṁ tadvadhūvasanaprōdgatadantiyanteghanavēdaṁḍāṁkitaṁ
vaktradaṁte sarōjāṁkitavāytu nōrppaḍenasuṁ ratnāgaraṁ sāgara . Ā jaḷadhi baḷedu baḷasida bhūjagamadhyapradēśadoḷu kanakanagaṁ rājīva
rāgabhōga bhrājitamaṇimukuḷadaṁte kaṇgesedikkuṁ . Antāśaiḷada śīlamumā giriya gurutvamā gōtrada gōtratvamumā parvvata
da sarvvasvamumippaṁtirddudā dvīpamadeṁtene . rajatādriyiṁde teṁkalu kujamikkuṁ jaṁbuveṁbudā pesareṁdaṁdajaniḍalā
nijanāmaṁ trijagakkaṁ negaḷe negaḷda jaṁbūdvīpaṁ . Ā jaṁbūdvīpadoḷanēka vastu vistāradiṁ sogayisuva dēśamadāvudene .
kantuharanennida bhavana kāṁteya kuṁtaḷada kusmakuḷamaṇi muktāsaṁtatiyantesedikkuṁ kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ viśēṣa vastubrajadiṁ .
Ā dēśadoḷsogayisuva banavasenāḍa calvadaṁtene . kūḍe surabhavanavudadhiyanēḍisuva taṭākavamaravanamahimeyanaḷḷāḍisu
va banaṁ banavasenāḍallada nāḍu nāḍeyuṁ sogeyiputē(dē) . Ā nāḍoḷuḷidaveseyave dhēnugaḷā kāmadhēnu suragiriyā
kānanave kalpabhūruhavēnaṁ pogaḷdapudā negaḷda beḷuhigenāḍaṁ . Ā nāḍoḷpalavuṁ teṟadineseva paṭṭaṇaprākāraveṁtene . vri . sutti
samudradanteseva pūrnnataṭākavagaḷteyādudōtottiyakottaḷaṁ tuṟugidaṭṭaḷe yiṭṭaḷavāge kaṭṭiduddvrittapatākeyiṁ bahu
vidhaṁ baluhappude durggavittalī guttoḷalattalā madhureyallade pālisaluṁṭe dhātri yoḷu . kaṁ . Ā durggā
dhipanennidanādiya naḷanahuṣaninajanā dharmmajanabjōdarasutanene negaḷdaṁ sādhita dikcakra vikramāṁkaṁ dhareyoḷu . praśa .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ujjēnīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ vaṭavrikṣa lāṁchitavijayadhvajaṁ bhu
vanarakṣaṇaiykadakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikabhairavaṁ Ānaṁditayuvatīnayanakairava caṁdraguptānva
yapūrnnacaṁdra vibhavāmarēṁdranuṁ haracaraṇanakhakiraṇasāṁdracaṁdrikācakōra gurupādapayōdharā
nanditamayūraṁ māninīmānasarvvasvasūṟekāṟaṁ raṇadoḷu nīṟaṁ pagemaccegaṁḍaṁ samaraśauṁḍaṁ viṣamaturaṁgamā
rōhaṇāditya vīravikramādityadēvaṁ banavāsenāḍaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . vri . pāvuge kaṁ
the bettapaṭa kharpparavāghuṭikārasaṁ pogarttīvidudoṁdu kūrasi manaṁbagedallige pōpa bēḷpa ratnāvaḷiyaṁ sacētana
madriśyamanaṁnamanātmarakkeyaṁ bhāvisidartthavārttiṟivivēṁ sale sādhyamō vikramāṁ kaniṁ . Amarddaṁ tatpuradoḷu nripōttamanenippā
vikramādityanaṣṭamahasiddhiyaneyde sādhisi jagakkānaṁdamāgittaniṣṭamaniṁbaṁsakanāgi mūjagamumaṁ sallīleyiṁ mucci
bhūramegiṁ tannaya tōḷa bāḷe maṟuvāḷilleṁbinantāḷdidaṁ . Enutummaḷippamanujara manastamaṁ piṁge naliye kavicakraṁ
mēdini kaṇbaḍadavolāgire janiyisidaṁ vīravikramāditya nripaṁ . samanārujjeyanīva raṁge sakanādā vikramāditya bhūramaṇaṁgurkkina
bhairavaṁgavadaṭaṁ tānādavaṁgoḷupinaṣṭamahāsiddhiyaneydesādhisidudāttaṁgarttigaṁgā rasōttamakuṁbhaṁgaḷanitta
vaṁge diṭadiṁdaṁ bhūribhūbhāgadoḷu . Enenegaḷda vikramādityana vaṁśajarātanaṁnarāgare kalpāvanījada bījade kaḷpāvanījaṁ pu
ṭṭaduve bēḷpavara keygayyoḷu . Arasarggilla rasapraśakti rasikatvaṁ kūḍe kūrppilla kūrppire vidyāvaḷiyilla viddeyire nērppillāge nērppilla saccaritaṁ
saccaritaṁ podaḷdire viḷāsaprītiyintī guṇōtkaravellaṁ neredirddarēnadhikanō śrī jōyidēvōrvvipaṁ . Ā jōyidēvanuṁ
natatējama saccaritamellamāsājame bēḷpājanasurabhūjame pōgījagadoḷu guttanripana sari peṟanāvaṁ . Ennirdda guttabhū
pāḷana tanugaganadoḷe rājakuḷakarakumudaṁ vinayadinēṁ mukuḷitavāge negaḷdanō dharege vikramādityanripaṁ . vri .
vinayaṁ vikramaśaktipuṇyavenipī mūṟuṁ guṇaṁ rājyamaṁḍana dēhāṁśugaḷiṁ negaḷte vaḍedikkuṁ cētanaṁ balpumeyvina
yaṁ bhūṣaṇameṁdu śastraruci śāstrābhyāsa saddharmmavarttanamendiṁtivu vīravikrama nripaṁgiṁtoppuguṁ saṁtataṁ . va . Antā
caṁdraguptānvayakke janmabhūmiyāda beḷuhigenāḍoḷanēka prākāradiṁ celuvanāda grāmaśikhāmaṇi kannavaḷḷiyeṁ
tene . vri . Ide kaiḷāpavenalke kaṇgesedu tōrppādēvagēhaṁgaḷiṁdide padmōdbhava nippatāṇavennirppā brahmavāsaṁgaḷiṁdide riṣyāśra
mameṁbavolu munijanāgāraṁgaḷiṁ sarvvaniṁpadadiṁmoppuva kaṁnavaḷḷiyanadiṁnēvaṇni phōṁ baṇnipaṁ . teṁgu kauvuṁgu
tāḷphalasumāvaranēṟilaśōke bāḷe nāraṁga lavaṁga nāgalate kētaki māgadhi jādi padma ṣaṁḍaṁ gaganōpamaṁ baḍeda pūrnna
taṭākadinetta nōrppaḍaṁ kaṇgesedirppudaṁgajanivāsadavolsale kannavaḷḷiyoḷu . Ā kannavaḷḷi yāḷvaṁ prākaṭapaṭu viśadakīrtti ma
nmathamūrttiśvīkāranenninegaḷdaṁ lōkajanastutyanappanāḷprabhu ceṁnaṁ . vri . paḍadartthaṁ baḍavargge baṁdhugaḷigāytā
jauvvanaṁ tanna kaipiḍida satsatigāytu tanmanamanūnāpēkṣe sadīkṣeyiṁ mriḍapādāṁbuja sēvegāytu
pesarā digdaṁtigāyetu(gāytu) nōrppaḍadēṁ dhātrige ceṁnnagauṁḍane valaṁ dhanyaṁ peṟarddhanyarē . Antā cennagauṁḍana sakaḷa bhā
gyame rūpugoṁḍaṁte guṇadiṁ dharmmadiṁ rūpiniṁ viddeyiṁ tējadiṁ khyātiyiṁdudāradiṁ suputraḥ kuladīpa
kayeṁba vākyamaṁ nanni māḍi . ka . vinayavidhi cāmiyakkana tanujaḷadhiyoḷātmaśānti nakṣatrakaṇaṁ janiyise cenna
ninirvvarmmanuvarggarppuruṣaratnarogedarpputraru . vri . sogasuva rūpu sōlisuva jāṇme manaṁgoḷipōje tāgi taḷtagiya
de niṁda vairibalavaṁ taṟidikkuva takkavarśaraṇbugemige rakṣipārpperadoḍāgaḷe bēḍita nīvudāravī jagadoḷagārssamaṁ prabhu
kulōttamanī vibhu bīragauṁḍanoḷu . bīranudāracāruguṇadoṁdu mahōnnate bīranoppuvācāracaritra bīrana gabhī
rate bīrana peṁpu bīranoḷpāra phogaḷtegādaṟuvu bīrana saṁnuta nanni bīranākāravadāra meccisadu bīrana kīrtti mahītaḷāgra
doḷu . māraṁ bīrānujātaṁ sukavinikarasaṁpādanaṁ kalpavrikṣōdāraṁ baṁdaṁjikaṁḍaṁ gereda budharge mēṇaṇmi niṁdaṁge
vajrāgāraṁ vidyādharēṁdraṁ surapatisutaneṁdaṁdu mikka(ṁ)nyariṁtī dhīrōdāttaṁgajē yaṁgeṇeyanaloḷarē nōrppaḍāvanda
diṁda . vri . Odavida jauvvanakke subagaṁ sirigoppuvudāramaṁ vacōvadananirīkṣaṇake maṇidarppaṇamaṁ celuviṁ
ge nōṭakarppadedu manaṁbugalkesava māḷkeyoḷippa sadupradēśamaṁ mudadoḷe māḍi māravesariṭṭa viriṁciye jāṇanallanē .
© svastiyanavarataśatamukhapramukhagīrvvāṇamakuṭamaṇimayamarīcimaṁjarījāḷaraṁjita śrīkallināthadēvara pādārā
dhakanuṁ . paramārtthatatvabhēdakanuṁ . Agaṇyapuṇyakīrttikāntāviḷāsanuṁ . bhāsva tsarasvatī suva rnnakarṇnakuṁḍaḷanumappaThe letter va is written above the line in smaller characters.
śrīmannāḷprabhu bīragāvuṁḍa māragāvuṁḍana putrana mahimeyeṁtene . dhāriṇige dharmmavākulanārige saubhā
gyaviṣṭajanadiṣṭaphaḷaṁ bhāratiya toḍavu negaḷdaṁ bīraṇanudarudadhiyoḷage rannaṁ cennaṁ . Antā kulakke kuladeyvave
puṭṭi samantudharmmamaṁ nirmmisuttamippantā mahānubhāvana mahimeyeṁtene . Āva guṇadoḷmahatvadoḷāvarsida bhaktibharado
ḷupaśāntateyoḷu jīvadayeyoḷvibhāvise dēvaṁ dēvaṇnaneṁba bhēdaṁ kiḍuguṁ . svastiyanavarataparamapadabhaktibharanirūpi
tānūnakēvalajñānōpayuktisūktiśaktaruṁ . viṣayaviraktaruṁ śivapādapaṁkaja pūjapuraṁdarōpamānānandadibyadēharuṁ .
manōvākkāyakarmmādigaḷitamōharuṁ śrīkallināthadēvaśēvāsukhāmritāṁbhōdhi pūrnnaruṁ . yanēka(ṁ) guṇa saṁpūrnna
rumappa dēvaṇnaṁgaḷa mahimeyeṁtene . ka . pusigeḍeguḍadavivēkaprasaṁgadoḷu sallada ghapathakāgada mānasavēṣada
haranirddanesedano munimukhyavarnnanī dēvaṇnaṁ . svasti śrīmatucāḷukya cakravartti sōyidēva variṣada 1155deneya vijeyasaṁ
vatsarada caitra sudhdha Aṣṭami sōmavāra byatīpātadaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīravikramādityadēvanuṁ kannavaḷḷiya cenna
gāvuṁḍanuṁvirddu mūlasthānada śrīkallināthadēvara śrīkāryyakke biṭṭa darmmada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe
diṁḍēśvaradēvara gaddeyiṁ baḍagal gauḍara mānyagaddeyiṁ mūḍalu gaddekaṁba 25 Ere hiriya
keṟeya kōḍiyiṁ baḍagal rittiyadāriyiṁ paḍuval mattaru 4 Alliṁ teṁka makkimattaru 2 keṁgāḍu mattaru 2 dē
vālyadiṁ teṁka hūdōṭa 1 tuḍuke 1 keṟevoḷage gauṁḍara keṁgāḍiṁ baḍaga hūdōṭa 1 manenīranuguteyiṁ teṁka va
ṭhāra 1 gāṇa 1 na vettu 10 kannavaḷḷiya hejjuṁka vokkaludeṟe manedeṟe sarvvabādheparihāra dhānyago
ḷaga soṭigeṇne tōṭada rmmamaṁ pratipāḷsidātanu vāraṇāśiya
taḍiyalu maṁ suvarnnadali kaṭṭikoṭṭa phalamakku .
I dharmmamanaḷida Aḷida pāpavaku . svadataṁ para
dataṁ vā yō ha [Ōṁ] namaśivāya . kallināthāya
sāsanamaṁ pēḷda sidharanappakallinātha baradaṁ . sarasva
thyāya nama namaḥ . vināyakāya namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.301 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
